name: HannsTouch Solution Incorporated
summary: HannsTouch Solution Incorporated engages in the production and sale of touch panels in Taiwan. It offers touching solutions for AMOLED and LCD monitors, wearable devices, cellphones, tablets, laptops, one-piece forming PC and industrial monitors, etc.; and TFT backplane solutions for RFID, e-book, e-board, etc. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.
